item.title: Version 0.5.27
item.description:
What's New in 0.5.27

# Release Notes for Version 0.5.27

Features

  • Multi-Select Enhancements: Added support for multi-select with keyboard shortcuts and a visual indicator for easier usage.
  • Save Options: Introduced a 'Save to...' option in the sample cell context menu for streamlined saving processes.
  • Background Click-to-Deselect: Users can now click on the background to deselect items, along with updated quick tips for better guidance.

    • Improvements

  • Optimized Animation Handling: Reduced unnecessary timers and improved performance by stopping the GlobalAnimationManager when idle.
  • Frame Rate Adjustment: Lowered Metal MTKView frame rate from 120 FPS to 60 FPS for more stable rendering.
  • Light/Dark Mode Support: Added support for light and dark modes in Sparkle update release notes.

    • Fixes

  • Context Menu and Multi-Select: Resolved issues with multi-select save and added a batch context menu.
  • Window Behavior: Fixed the plugin window floating issue to ensure proper z-ordering in DAWs.
  • Stability Improvements: Addressed various use-after-free errors and crashes related to settings panel tabs and audio processing.
  • Update Process: Fixed multiple issues with AU validation timeouts, PKG installer crashes, and the Sparkle updater functionality.
    • --- Source: `81e7b965` on `main` ([view commit](https://github.com/danielraffel/PlunderTube/commit/81e7b96506595d920884f0c3f8cb84f2fe406a17))

    Build 1087 · 81e7b965 on main
